_reason: Tailwind false-positive: class '[&_.gallery]:mb-4' on the article body div matches the 'gallery' NOISE_CLASS_SUBSTRING, causing stripNoise() to remove the entire content container. Fix: either add CNN Brasil to specific extractor with Tailwind-aware selector, or exclude Tailwind arbitrary-variant classes from noise matching.
title: Preço do petróleo Brent sobe após ataques militares dos EUA contra Irã
firstParagraphContains: Os preços do petróleo Brent avançam nesta terça-feira
